case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR VS. STEPHEN BOLDENWECK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.50) SERVED FEB-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDENWECK, STEPHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND SAYS HE WAS NOT SERVED BUT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDENWECK, STEPHEN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDENWECK, STEPHEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDENWECK, STEPHEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDENWECK, STEPHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
